summary: Iteration 188 Test Complete - Route extraction and new features verified. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend pages loaded successfully with expected components.

issues: 'Missing API Keys' modal appears on all pages - expected behavior warning about optional integrations (Heartbeat, Emailit, Cloudinary), does not block functionality

ROUTE_EXTRACTION_admin_members.description: Member routes extracted to admin_members_routes.py - GET /api/admin/members, GET /api/admin/members/stats/overview all working

HABITS_pending_proofs.description: GET /api/habits/admin/pending-proofs returns completions with screenshot_url and ai_review data

HABITS_spot_check_action.description: POST /api/habits/admin/spot-check/{completion_id} returns 404 for invalid ID (validation working)

TEAM_my_team.description: GET /api/referrals/my-team returns team array with stats (total=1, active=0, in_danger=0, new_this_week=0)

TEAM_recommendations.description: GET /api/referrals/my-team/recommendations returns AI recommendations array (OpenRouter AI with fallback to rule-based)

STORE_items.description: GET /api/store/items returns store items (immunity credits) - store routes still working

ADMIN_cleanup_overview.description: GET /api/admin/cleanup-overview returns all sections - cleanup routes still working

FRONTEND_admin_cleanup.description: Admin Cleanup page shows 5 stat cards, Pending Screenshot Proofs section with user/habit info and approve/reject buttons

FRONTEND_my_team.description: My Team page shows 4 stat cards (Total Members, Active This Week, In Danger, New This Week) and Team Members list

FRONTEND_profit_tracker_components.description: Profit Tracker page shows ProjectionVision component with Summary/Monthly Table tabs, balance chart, and projection cards

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing admin account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 188 complete. Verified: 1) Admin member routes successfully extracted to admin_members_routes.py (GET /members, GET /members/stats/overview working), 2) Habits admin endpoints for proof review (pending-proofs, spot-check, spot-check-stats) working, 3) Team recommendations endpoint returns AI recommendations (OpenRouter with rule-based fallback), 4) ProfitTrackerPage uses ProjectionVision and AdjustTradeDialog components. Frontend pages all load correctly with expected elements. AI Visual Review badges show 'No AI review' for proofs pending review. The Rewards Platform API is MOCKED.
mocked_api_note: Rewards Platform sync_user_to_rewards_platform is MOCKED. OpenRouter AI is used for team recommendations but has fallback to rule-based suggestions if API key is missing or call fails.
